name: Recordbooks
short_description: Survive in Toxic Gas and Fights . Kill First or Die First . Experience Bodycam Game First time Ever . Play as a secret agency agent at Mysterious Area whose duty is to solve Complex and Mysterious cases of duty area .Your Detective and Tactical skill is needed to solve these complex cases.
detailed_description:
'Recordbooks' is a photorealistic bodycam first-person tactical shooter game developed in unreal engine 5 with the latest technology . Recordbooks features completely new type game mechanics and story in a photorealistic Environment. it also features 8K Resulation.Players will experience new feature , new story and new type of gameplay in Recordbooks.Its a newly designed unique tactical game where you will play as a secret agent whose duty is to solve the complex and mysterious cases.. There will be some mysterious and complex cases at your duty area. Your secret agency authority will send you to investigate and handle the situation . Player will reach there and fight against the opposition and take control the area from enemy without doing any harm to the innocent .Rescue the innocent , destroy the enemy and gain your victory with your tactical skill.

Survive into toxic Gas.
Huge Level Of Destruction

Two Wonderfull Maps - The Vice Land and Toxic City.
Kill FIrst Or Die First.
Eliminate All suspects as soon as possible.
Use powerfull weapon to Destroy Suspects Base .
New Blood On Floor Effects Added.
